name: Unibap AB (publ)
summary: Unibap AB (publ) supplies vision processing and visual perception solutions in Sweden. The company offers intelligent vision system-70 stereo cameras; optimized development environment kits that allow users to prototype software and develop HDL code for the FPGA, as well as test new upgrades and switching between processing module families; heterogeneous computing modules; and RCab300, a healthcare logistics solution for the autonomous transportation of small goods, such as medications, test samples, and blood products, as well as pulling carts with linen, liquids, food, and sterilized goods. Its products are used in intelligent industrial automation, intelligent 3D vision, unmanned autonomous surveillance, managed surveillance, robot and drone guidance, and machine tooling inspection applications. The company was founded in 2013 and is based in Uppsala, Sweden.
